description_long: This is a men's open-toe slip-on sandal featuring a dark brown synthetic or leather upper with prominent tan stitching along the edges and seams. The sandal has a wide, contoured footbed with visible stitching and a lightly textured insole, likely designed for comfort and grip. The upper consists of two main straps with cut-out sections on the sides, providing breathability and ease of wear. The sole is black, moderately thick, and appears to be made of rubber or a similar material, offering durability and traction. The overall design is casual and practical, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or home settings. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the sandal appears to be in new or like-new condition.
description: A dark brown men's slip-on sandal with tan stitching, open toe, and a contoured, textured footbed. The sandal features a durable black sole and cut-out side sections for breathability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open toe, contoured footbed, and prominent tan stitching along the upper edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two main straps, cut-out side sections, and the full length of the black sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel area, the back of the footbed, and the stitching detail around the perimeter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same strap and cut-out design, with clear visibility of the stitching and sole profile.
